prompt:
A signed-off preparation sheet clipped to a chemistry bench, with beaker, graduated cylinder, PPE, waste cup, and ventilation staging visible around it in an orderly layout. It should clearly read as a preflight-style safety checklist without readable text.

Photorealistic 512×512 image with soft bench lighting, realistic paper, glass, and PPE textures, no logos, no readable words, and no identifiable faces. Keep the checklist centered and uncluttered.
